pwa.title: Install ATHRON
pwa.androidHint: Open faster from your home screen, like a native app.
pwa.iosHint: Open in Safari, tap Share, then choose «Add to Home Screen».

auth.bioPlaceholder: E.g. I train in the mornings, working on my first muscle up
auth.photoCropHint: Vertical Instagram-style format — we keep your original framing.
auth.photoCropFailed: Could not prepare the photo. Try another image.
auth.photoUploadFailed: Could not save your photo. You can upload it from your profile.
auth.confirmEmail: Check your email to confirm your account, then sign in.
auth.configMissing: The app is not connected to Supabase. An admin must set the environment variables in Vercel and redeploy.

boxInactive.subtitle: Gym unavailable
boxInactive.message: Your gym is not active on ATHRON. Contact the administrator to restore access.
boxInactive.messageWithBox: «{box}» is not active on ATHRON. Contact the administrator to restore access.

athronAdmin.dashboardDesc: Manage all gyms on the platform
athronAdmin.deleteBoxConfirm: «{name}» and all its data will be removed: users, classes, bookings, memberships, ranking and plans. This cannot be undone.
athronAdmin.deleteBoxWarning: Irreversible action. Deactivate the box first if it is still active.
athronAdmin.deleteBoxScopeUsers: {count, plural, one {# user account} other {# user accounts}}
athronAdmin.statusOverviewDesc: Gym operational status and ATHRON SaaS subscription
athronAdmin.boxOperationalHint: Controls whether the gym can operate on the platform (login, access).
athronAdmin.planSectionDesc: Manage plan, promotional access and subscription status
athronAdmin.featuresSectionDesc: Manual overrides on top of the assigned plan

myAthletes.title: My athletes
myAthletes.subtitle: Track your box members with their skills, PR/RM records, and membership status.
myAthletes.emptyDescription: Once members are registered in this box, they will appear here.

legacy.title: Your Legacy
legacy.subtitle: Create your Athlete Card — a premium sports identity to share on social.
legacy.saved: Legacy profile saved. Your card is updated.

editor.title: Your sports identity
editor.hint: Data shown on your Athlete Card. Photo and name are edited in Profile.

legacy.waitBeforeShare: Wait {seconds} seconds before sharing — we're making sure your photo looks perfect.

errors.yearsInvalid: Years training must be 0 or more.
errors.photoExportFailed: We couldn't load your photo for sharing. Update your photo in Profile and try again.

membership.title: My membership
membership.expired: Your membership expired on {date}. Contact the gym to renew.
membership.pending: Your account is pending payment. Contact the gym to activate your plan.
membership.editMembershipDesc: Fix the plan or dates if something was entered wrong.
membership.assignPlanDesc: For new members or those without an active membership.
membership.assignPlanAutoDesc: Expiry is calculated automatically from the plan duration (e.g. 30 days).
membership.activateMonthDesc: You choose the expiry date (cash payment, promotion, etc.).
membership.manageActiveDesc: You can correct the plan and dates at any time.
membership.manageExpiredDesc: Membership expired. Edit it or assign a new plan.
membership.daysRemaining: {days, plural, =0 {Expires today} =1 {1 day left} other {# days left}}

socio.bookingsSubtitle: Pick a day and book your class in seconds.
socio.membershipSubtitle: Check your plan and expiry dates.
socio.profileSubtitle: Update your photo and contact details.
socio.profileEmailHint: Your login email (cannot be changed here).
socio.profileLegacyHint: Weight, height, discipline and your Athlete Card live in
socio.profileLegacyHintDetail: name and photo are edited here.
socio.classHistoryDesc: Classes you attended, your scores, and bookings you missed.
socio.noClassHistory: No classes in your history yet.

socioHome.tagline: Your training day at a glance.

nextClass.label: Next class
nextClass.emptyDesc: Pick a class and lock your spot.
nextClass.cancelTooLate: Cancellation available until {hours} h before class.

membership.label: Membership

ranking.title: Ranking
ranking.unavailable: Ranking not available on your plan.

sections.bookingSubtitle: Pick a day and time on the calendar
sections.bookingSubtitleBooked: Your booking is confirmed — cancel or choose another class

scores.logScoreSubtitle: Write it here and it will be saved to your history.
scores.logScoreHint: Record your WOD result. It feeds your history and the daily ranking.
scores.stepRx: 2. Did you use the full prescribed weight?
scores.rxHint: Not sure? Pick the option that fits best.
scores.exampleOtro: Describe your result in your own words
scores.notesPlaceholder: E.g. first time RX, PR, etc.
scores.displayRequired: Enter your result in the box above
scores.invalidScore: Check the format. See the example below the box.
scores.noScoreHint: That's fine. This class doesn't need a number. Save when ready, or add a note below.
scores.noScoreRecordedHint: You marked this class as having no result to log.
scores.rankingSyncFailed: Your result was saved, but we couldn't update the ranking. Please save again.
scores.rankingRespect: Rankings are grouped by each athlete's Legacy Athlete Card level: Beginner, Intermediate, Advanced, or RX. RX/Scaled on each result is the WOD weight modality, not their category.
scores.rankingCategoryNote: You only see athletes in your Legacy category. RX/Scaled is the weight you used in the WOD.
scores.rankingByScoreType: Each result type has its own ranking (calories, time, rounds, etc.).
scores.rankingFallbackDate: No scores yet today. Showing the latest day with results: {date}.
scores.noScoresInCategory: No scores in this category yet.
scores.uncategorizedHint: Athletes without a Legacy level. Set it in your Athlete Card (Sports level).
scores.noRankingYetHint: When athletes log scores, they'll appear here in their Legacy category (Beginner, Intermediate, Advanced, RX).
scores.rankingUnavailable: Ranking is not available right now.
scores.shareRankingDesc: One public link with all categories. Share it in your box WhatsApp group.
scores.whatsappShareText: 🏋️ Today's WOD ranking — see how your category did:
scores.adminRankingSubtitle: Ranking by Legacy category (Beginner, Intermediate, Advanced, RX) from each athlete's Athlete Card level.
scores.setLevelHint: Set your level in Legacy to see your ranking.

classes.title: Classes
classes.bookTooLate: Bookings close {minutes} min before class starts
classes.reservationLimit: You can only have {max} active bookings. Cancel one or wait until a class ends.
classes.reservationLimitHint: {count}/{max} active bookings · a slot opens when a class ends
classes.attendanceAfterClass: Mark attendance after the class ends. Athletes are enrolled for now.
classes.noEnrolled: No one enrolled in this class
classes.coachClassesDesc: Select a class to mark attendance with ✓ or ✗.
classes.tapClassForAttendance: Tap a class above to mark attendance
classes.bookedToday: {count, plural, =1 {You have 1 booking today} other {You have # bookings today}}
classes.bookedSelectedDay: {count, plural, =1 {You have 1 booking {dayLabel}} other {You have # bookings {dayLabel}}}
classes.tryAnotherDay: Try another day of the week
classes.deleteClassWarning: Members are enrolled. Their bookings will be removed.
classes.invalidTimeRange: End time must be after start time
classes.scheduleOverlapDesc: There {count, plural, =1 {is already a class} other {are already # classes}} scheduled at an overlapping time:
classes.scheduleOverlapResponsibility: If you continue, you confirm that overlapping schedules are your responsibility as the administrator.
classes.historyMonthSummary: {count, plural, one {# class} other {# classes}} · {attended} attended
classes.workoutPlaceholder:

5 rounds

• 10 pull-ups
classes.workoutHint: Members will see this on the class card. You can use line breaks.
classes.workoutCreateHint: Optional. If left empty, a sample workout is used based on the class name.
classes.adminSubtitle: Schedule classes, review capacity and mark attendance.
classes.adminNoClassesDay: No classes scheduled for this day.

expediente.progressDesc: Summary of recent PRs and skills

admin.createUserSuccess: Member created. They can sign in immediately with the email and password you set.
admin.createCoachDesc: Set email and password. The coach will receive a confirmation email and can sign in with those credentials.
admin.createCoachSuccess: Coach created. Confirmation email sent — share the password so they can sign in after confirming.
admin.coachesSubtitle: Add coaches manually. They only see their classes and can mark attendance.
admin.passwordNotStored: For security, the original password is not stored. You can reset it here and see the new one once.
admin.newPasswordSet: New password set — share it with the coach:
admin.saveCredentials: Save these credentials. The password cannot be viewed again.
admin.deleteUserWarning: This cannot be undone. Their memberships, bookings, and attendance history will also be deleted.
admin.deleteCoachWarning: This cannot be undone. Their login account and all related data will be deleted.
admin.editContactDesc: Fix email or phone. Changing the email updates how the member signs in.
admin.coachProfileDesc: Your photo and bio are shown to members on the classes you teach.
admin.coachBioPlaceholder: E.g. Olympic lifting and mobility specialist. 5 years of CrossFit experience.
admin.coachBioHint: Visible to members when they book your classes.
admin.boxOwnerProfileDesc: Update your box logo and your community description.
admin.boxPhotoHint: Shown in ranking, cards, and your athletes' app.
admin.boxBioPlaceholder: E.g. We want to be the best CrossFit box in the area and grow our community.
admin.boxBioHint: Describe your box vision for your team and members.
admin.expiresInDays: Expires in {days, plural, =0 {less than 1 day} =1 {1 day} other {# days}} — send WhatsApp reminder
admin.noClassHistory: No bookings or attendance recorded yet.

dashboard.coachGoalActive: Your coach can see it in My athletes

goals.empty: Tell your coach what you want to improve — they can see it.
goals.name: What do you want your coach to help you improve?

recordTypeHint.pr: Personal Record — your all-time best on this movement.
recordTypeHint.rm: Rep Max — your best weight for a specific rep count (e.g. 3RM, 5RM).

progress.deleteRecordConfirm: Delete {record}? Associated ranking points for this achievement will be removed.

rankingAthron.missingBoxParam: Ranking unavailable. Use the share link from your box (it must include ?box=...).
rankingAthron.unavailableForBox: Ranking is not available for this box.
rankingAthron.emptyLeaderboard: No athletes on the leaderboard yet this month. Consistency builds champions!
rankingAthron.dailyHistoryWeekSummary: {days, plural, one {# day} other {# days}} · {classes, plural, one {# class} other {# classes}} · {points} pts
rankingAthron.howItWorksTitle: How is the Athron Ranking calculated?
rankingAthron.howItWorksSubtitle: Consistency comes first. Every point counts toward your monthly position.
rankingAthron.howAttendanceDesc: +{points} pts each time your coach confirms your attendance.
rankingAthron.howStreakDesc: Extra bonus for consecutive days with at least one attendance.
rankingAthron.howWodDesc: Every rank in your Legacy category scores: 1st {first} pts, 2nd {second} pts … 10th {tenth} pts (11th+ drops by 2, min. 5). Scaled = those points; RX adds +{rxBonus} extra.
rankingAthron.howEvolutionDesc: Improve your score or rank: +{small} to +{large} pts depending on progress.
rankingAthron.howAchievementsDesc: PRs, skills and milestones add extra points (once per achievement).
rankingAthron.whatsappShare: 🏆 Athron Ranking — See who's leading the league!
rankingAthron.adminSubtitle: Configure points, share the ranking and celebrate your athletes.
rankingAthron.configEnabledHint: Disable to hide the public ranking.
rankingAthron.configRxBonus: RX bonus (extra pts for prescribed weights)
rankingAthron.sectionSubtitle: Your monthly points, streak and position in your Legacy category.
rankingAthron.breakdownTitle: Why did they earn these points?
